deal_of_the_day.title: FlightScope Mevo+ Launch Monitor
deal_of_the_day.verdict: Still the best single deal on the board three mornings running: the Mevo+ has been the serious-amateur launch monitor for years, and better than half off its usual $2,299 is the kind of price that used to mean waiting for Black Friday — and even then, rarely on this unit.

deals.title: SkyTrak+ SimStudio ESSENTIALS Package (Complete Studio)
deals.verdict: A whole bay in one box — SkyTrak+ launch monitor, impact screen, enclosure, hitting mat, projector and a year of Foresight course play — for $2,600 under its usual ask. If you'd rather buy the room than assemble it deal by deal, this is the honest all-in number.

deals.title: SwingBay Simulator Screen & Enclosure
deals.verdict: The screen-and-enclosure half of a garage sim build, $1,500 under its usual ask. Pair it with any launch monitor you already own and you're most of the way to a bay.

deals.title: SIGPRO 84″ × 84″ Premium Impact Screen (Clearance)
deals.verdict: Real clearance on the consumable part of every sim setup — screens wear out, and half-price is when you buy the spare. Odd sizes are going fast; measure before you order.

deals.title: FlightScope Mevo+ Pro Package & Face Impact Bundle
deals.verdict: Already own a Mevo+? The Pro Package software unlock — the full 50-plus data parameters plus face impact location — at $650 off is the cheapest we know of to turn it into the tour-data version.

_killlist_note: Rejected deals live in data/deals-killlist.json — the single source of truth enforced by BOTH build-deals.mjs and build-deal-hubs.mjs. Note (Jul 13): the SkyTrak+ Certified Pre-Owned at $1,350 was dropped from the board because the nightly bot no longer confirms it discounted/available — re-verify before restoring.
